nasb.text: Then the proconsul believed when he saw what had happened, being amazed at the teaching of the Lord.

esv.text: Then the proconsul believed, when he saw what had occurred, for he was astonished at the teaching of the Lord.

cnv.text: 那時，省長看見了所發生的事，就信了，因為他驚奇主的教訓。

ccb.text: 总督看见所发生的事，对主的道感到惊奇，就信了。

csbs.text: 省长当时看见所发生的事，对主的教导惊叹不已，就信了。
